channel.title: Adarsh | Technical Articles & Logs
channel.description: Technical essays, architectural reviews, and tutorials on systems design.

item.title: Melodic Sequence Generation: Deep LSTMs vs. Probabilistic Markov Chains in Generative Music AI
item.description: A comparative study of deep recurrent sequence networks and probabilistic Markov models in music generation, analyzing training pipelines, mathematical foundations, and genre-specific performance.

item.title: Scaling Database Operations in WordPress: Optimizing Bulk Imports and Flat Query Caching
item.description: An exploration of relational normalization bottlenecks under heavy indexing, custom denormalized database caching, and SQL relevance-weighted candidate scoring.

item.title: Architecting Concurrency-Safe WordPress Checkouts: Overcoming Event Espresso SPCO Race Conditions
item.description: A deep dive into concurrency bottlenecks within the Event Espresso 4 Single-Page Checkout (SPCO) flow, implementing forced entity map cache invalidation, raw request self-healing, and direct database bypasses.
